formulas.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
formulas.operation: Research and development + Sales, general and administrative

formulas.formula: Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income net equals Total other income net
formulas.operation: Interest income - Interest expense + Other income, net

formulas.formula: Operating income plus Total other income net equals Income before income tax
formulas.operation: Operating income + Total other income, net

formulas.formula: Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
formulas.operation: Income before income tax - Income tax expense

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets
components: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents + Marketable securities + Accounts receivable, net + Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other current assets

formulas.formula: Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Non-marketable equity securities plus Other assets equals Total assets
formulas.operation: Total current assets + Property and equipment, net + Operating lease assets + Goodwill + Intangible assets, net + Deferred income tax assets + Non-marketable equity securities + Other assets

formulas.formula: Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
formulas.operation: Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Short-term debt

formulas.formula: Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
formulas.operation: Total current liabilities + Long-term debt + Long-term operating lease liabilities + Other long-term liabilities

formulas.formula: Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Common stock + Additional paid-in capital + Accumulated other comprehensive income + Retained earnings

formulas.formula: Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
formulas.operation: Total assets - Total liabilities and shareholders equity

formulas.formula: Net income plus Stock-based compensation expense plus Depreciation and amortization minus Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities net plus Deferred income taxes plus Other plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
components: Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net
Net cash provided by operating activities
formulas.operation: Net income + Stock-based compensation expense + Depreciation and amortization - Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities, net + Deferred income taxes + Other - Accounts receivable - Inventories + Prepaid expenses and other assets + Accounts payable + Accrued and other current liabilities + Other long-term liabilities
formulas.result_label: Net cash provided by operating activities

formulas.formula: Sum of investing cash flows equals Net cash used in investing activities
components: Proceeds from sales of marketable securities
Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities
Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities
Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in investing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds from sales of marketable securities + Proceeds from maturities of marketable securities + Proceeds from sales of non-marketable equity securities - Purchases of marketable securities - Purchases of non-marketable equity securities - Groq, Inc. - Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets - Acquisitions, net of cash acquired + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in investing activities

formulas.formula: Sum of financing cash flows equals Net cash used in financing activities
components: Proceeds related to employee stock plans
Payments related to repurchases of common stock
Payments related to employee stock plan taxes
Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets
Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.operation: Proceeds related to employee stock plans - Payments related to repurchases of common stock - Payments related to employee stock plan taxes - Dividends paid - Principal payments on property and equipment and intangible assets - Repayment of debt + Other
formulas.result_label: Net cash used in financing activities

formulas.formula: Net cash provided by operating activities plus Net cash used in investing activities plus Net cash used in financing activities equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
components: Net cash provided by operating activities
Net cash used in investing activities
Net cash used in financing activities
Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.operation: Net cash provided by operating activities + Net cash used in investing activities + Net cash used in financing activities
formulas.result_label: Change in cash and cash equivalents

formulas.formula: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period plus Change in cash and cash equivalents equals Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
components: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
formulas.operation: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period + Change in cash and cash equivalents
formulas.result_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period

cross_statement_checks.check: Net income on IS matches Net income starting CF
Ending cash on CF matches Cash on BS (current period Jan 25 2026)
Ending cash on CF (2026-01-25) equals Cash and cash equivalents on BS (2026-01-25)
Beginning cash on CF (Jan 26 2025) matches Cash on BS prior period (Jan 26 2025)
Retained earnings change on BS equals Net income minus dividends minus shares repurchased charged to retained earnings minus tax withholding charged to retained earnings

formula_checks.formula: Revenue minus Cost of revenue equals Gross profit
Research and development plus Sales general and administrative equals Total operating expenses
Gross profit minus Total operating expenses equals Operating income
Interest income minus Interest expense plus Other income net equals Total other income net
Operating income plus Total other income net equals Income before income tax
Income before income tax minus Income tax expense equals Net income
Cash and cash equivalents plus Marketable securities plus Accounts receivable net plus Inventories plus Prepaid expenses and other current assets equals Total current assets

Total current assets plus Property and equipment net plus Operating lease assets plus Goodwill plus Intangible assets net plus Deferred income tax assets plus Non-marketable equity securities plus Other assets equals Total assets
Accounts payable plus Accrued and other current liabilities plus Short-term debt equals Total current liabilities
Total current liabilities plus Long-term debt plus Long-term operating lease liabilities plus Other long-term liabilities equals Total liabilities
Common stock plus Additional paid-in capital plus Accumulated other comprehensive income plus Retained earnings equals Total shareholders equity
Total liabilities plus Total shareholders equity equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity
Total assets equals Total liabilities and shareholders equity

Net income plus Stock-based compensation expense plus Depreciation and amortization minus Gains on non-marketable equity securities and publicly-held equity securities net plus Deferred income taxes plus Other plus changes in working capital equals Net cash provided by operating activities
Sum of investing cash flows equals Net cash used in investing activities
Sum of financing cash flows equals Net cash used in financing activities
Net cash provided by operating activities plus Net cash used in investing activities plus Net cash used in financing activities equals Change in cash and cash equivalents
Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period plus Change in cash and cash equivalents equals Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
